assumptions: The developer has a supported browser and email address.
No Cloudflare account, Worker project, or Workers onboarding interface has been selected yet.
Node.js may be available later if a CLI route is chosen.

developer_goal: Create a Cloudflare account and deploy a first Worker to a public workers.dev endpoint.

first_success.outcome: Unresolved among parallel Workers getting-started routes that can all reach a deployed Worker, with different surfaces and prerequisites.
first_success.observable_signal: A common candidate signal is a public workers.dev response such as Hello Worker!, but the route to that signal is not uniquely selected.

route_selection.rule: Official Workers getting started lists CLI, Dashboard, Prompting, and Templates as parallel options; lexicographic selection cannot invent a winner when routes are coequal and consequential.

candidates.name: Workers CLI (C3 + Wrangler)
candidates.reason: Complete code-first path requiring Node.js and account login; one of four listed getting-started options.

candidates.name: Workers Dashboard
candidates.reason: Parallel dashboard path that uses a Git provider and different required authorizations.

candidates.name: Workers Prompting
candidates.reason: Parallel agent-assisted route whose steps depend on the AI tool and prompt.

candidates.name: Workers Templates
candidates.reason: Requires choosing among many templates rather than one universal Worker outcome.

candidates.name: Workers Playground
candidates.reason: Cloudflare positions it for instant preview; accountful deploy onboarding differs from CLI and Dashboard journeys.

required_path.action: Sign up for a Cloudflare account required by the chosen CLI or Dashboard deployment route.

required_fields.label: Cloudflare account signup fields
required_fields.notes: CLI guide requires signup; dash.cloudflare.com/sign-up was temporarily unavailable during this audit, so live fields were not observed.

required_path.observable_result: The developer has an authenticated Cloudflare account.

required_path.action: Choose one Workers getting-started surface: CLI, Dashboard, Prompting, or Templates.
required_path.observable_result: One Workers first-success route is fixed.

required_path.action: If the CLI candidate is later selected, create a Worker with C3, edit the response, and deploy with Wrangler.

required_fields.label: C3 starter, template, language, git, and deploy prompts

required_path.observable_result: A Worker project exists locally and can be published to workers.dev.

prerequisites.description: Node.js 16.17.0 or later for the CLI route.
A supported Git provider and repository choice for the Dashboard route.

external_gates.description: Browser login to a Cloudflare account during first Wrangler use on the CLI route.

unavoidable_waits.description: First workers.dev publish can briefly return 523 errors that resolve without further developer action.

platform_outcomes.description: Wrangler deploy publishes the Worker to a workers.dev subdomain on the CLI candidate route.

excluded.reason: Documentation identifies parallel routes; reading is not a product action.
Different journey boundary from CLI and Dashboard deployment guides.

sources.title: Workers Getting started
evidence_supported: Parallel CLI, Dashboard, Prompting, and Templates options

sources.title: Cloudflare Dashboard sign-up
evidence_supported: Sign-up URL reachable but dashboard temporarily unavailable during audit

uncertainties.question: Which Workers onboarding surface is the selected shortest path: CLI, Dashboard, Prompting, or Templates?
uncertainties.impact: Prerequisites, authorizations, and action counts differ materially across the parallel official options.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Human selection of one Workers surface, then a fresh-account walkthrough to the workers.dev terminal.

uncertainties.question: What required fields appear on the current Cloudflare sign-up form?
uncertainties.impact: Account field counts cannot be verified while the public sign-up UI is unavailable or unobserved.
uncertainties.evidence_needed: Dated screenshots of a working dash.cloudflare.com/sign-up session.
